api.title: API
api.description: The `ApollonEditor` surface — constructor options, lifecycle, and subscriptions.

api/export.title: Export
api/export.description: SVG, PNG, PDF, and JSON export from a mounted editor or a headless model.

embedding/angular.title: Angular
embedding/angular.description: Embed Apollon in an Angular host using the default standalone bundle.

embedding/install.title: Install
embedding/install.description: Pick a subpath, install the library, ship.

embedding/react.title: React
embedding/react.description: Embed Apollon in a React host using the `/react` subpath to dedupe React.

embedding/vanilla.title: Vanilla JS / CDN
embedding/vanilla.description: Drop Apollon into a plain HTML page with one script tag.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Embeddable UML modeling editor. Framework-agnostic by default; React-shared opt-in for bundle dedupe.
